tables.name: patients
tables.comments: Clinical patient profile linked to a user.

tables.name: patient_devices
tables.comments: Patient device used for push delivery.

tables.name: patient_family_history
tables.comments: Family medical history for risk context.

tables.name: medical_intake
tables.comments: Structured intake captured for the patient.

notes.content: Read: FK > owner. Areas group schemas. Lines should flow left to right.
user becomes patient; intake, consent, history, devices, and insurance extend the record.
